title: quercus hintoniorum
intro: Quercus hintoniorum, also known as Hinton's oak, is a species of oak tree native to Mexico. Its bark and leaves contain medicinal properties, including flavonoids and tannins, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Quercus hintoniorum typically include decoctions of the bark and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
